creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
Hm.  I am not really sure what to do about this PR.

Is this a new site/user group?  Because what we have at the moment looks 
a little bit like a "link collection page".  A lot of links pointing to 
pictures.  But no mailinglists.  No announcements.  No real content.

So at least we will need more information before we can add you to our 
user group list.

Regards.


jkois

-- 
  Johann Kois
  jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
  FreeBSD Documentation Project
  FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
